title: Jeffries Says He Will Oppose Proposal to Cut Off U.S. Aid to Israel
summary_full: The House Democratic leader said he would not seek to persuade other Democrats to vote against the measure, which has divided the party amid a deep rift over support for Israel.
summary_public: The House Democratic leader said he would not seek to persuade other Democrats to vote against the measure, which has divided the party amid a deep rift over support for Israel.

IL.label: neutral
